title: Manufacturing Engineer - ACC Limited - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - ACC Limited - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at ACC Limited are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ACC Limited:
ACC Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ACC Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
